task: Accounting sub-nav 12 QBO items (exact live order) + global topbar + Create and Tasks buttons. Shell pages for missing routes. Additive only. No posting, no financial writes.

resolution.finding: The audit reported QboAccountingSubNav.tsx as a 'missing' component leaving QBO_ACCOUNTING_SUBNAV a dead export. Investigation shows the component was INTENTIONALLY deleted in PR #1552 (commit e8933bb7, nav-unification) and its absence is now CI-enforced by scripts/verify-accounting-nav.mjs Check 7. The deleted component rendered as a vertical left-rail strip, which violates the locked UI rule (CLAUDE.md §7: all nav on the top horizontal bar, no second left panel). The live accounting chrome is AccountingSubNavWrapper rendering ACCOUNTING_CLEAN_TABS + ACCOUNTING_MORE_TABS + a '+ Create' menu. The QBO-parity shell routes (Receipts/Integration transactions/Revenue recognition/Fixed assets/Prepaid expenses/My accountant) already exist as routed pages wrapped by AccountingSubNavWrapper.
resolution.fix: Did NOT rebuild QboAccountingSubNav.tsx (would fail the CI guard and re-add a forbidden left rail). Retired the dead QBO_ACCOUNTING_SUBNAV export + QboSubNavItem type from subnav-manifest.ts and left a breadcrumb comment so future audits do not re-flag the drift. No user-facing surface changes; additive-safe.
